description: Multi-turn: file_write to create -> file_edit to mutate a section (covers FileEditTool; distinct from file_write).

turns.user: Use the file_write tool to write to /tmp/eval-edit-target.txt with content: 'color=red\nsize=10\nshape=circle'.
Use the file_edit tool to change 'color=red' to 'color=blue' in /tmp/eval-edit-target.txt.

per_turn: Turn 2: Agent invokes `file_edit(path='/tmp/eval-edit-target.txt', old_string='color=red', new_string='color=blue')`; must NOT just overwrite via file_write
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must actually call file_edit (with old_string + new_string params)
